rationale: Introduce a concise procedural config to keep CLI arguments short and favor file-based payloads to reduce Windows command-length risk without touching code.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.procedural.cli_arglen_policy.v1",
  "max_arg_chars": 6000,
  "prefer_file_payload": true,
  "truncate_logs": true,
  "notes": "Keep CLI args short on Windows; pass large data via files when possible."
}

risks: New policy file may be unused until referenced; no behavior change if not read.
expected_benefit: Enables short-arg conventions and future hooks to avoid Windows CLI arg-length failures.
